items.title: Aerodrome is turning liquidity into a prediction market with its biggest upgrade yet
items.summary: The concept, called Predictive Allocation, will encourage participants to anticipate where liquidity will be needed next, instead of rewarding them for directing incentives toward pools that have already generated fees.

items.title: Anthropic's Mythos AI finds no more 'serious' bugs in Zcash: Wilcox
items.summary: Zcash founder Zooko Wilcox said Anthropic's Mythos AI model found no further “serious bugs” in the privacy protocol following the patching of a previously discovered forgery bug.

items.title: Bitcoin traders have a reason to watch Tuesday's BOJ rate decision. Yen shorts are at a nine-year high
items.summary: A large build-up of speculative short positions in the yen raises the risk of a sharp short squeeze if the BOJ signals more aggressive tightening, potentially unwinding yen-funded carry trades that support risk assets.

items.title: Bitcoin hits a two-week high above $65,500 as the US-Iran deal sends oil sliding
items.summary: A peace agreement that reopens the Strait of Hormuz pulled the geopolitical premium out of oil and put back into risk assets.

items.title: Trump says Iran peace deal to be signed Sunday, contradicting Tehran
items.summary: Crypto analyst Michaël van de Poppe said a peace deal, which would reopen the Strait of Hormuz, would likely send liquidity back to risk-on assets such as cryptocurrencies.

items.title: Amazon warning triggered US crackdown on Anthropic AI models: Reports
items.summary: Calls from Amazon CEO Andy Jassy and other tech firms prompted the Trump administration to suspend foreign access to Anthropic’s Fable 5 and Mythos 5 AI models on Friday.

items.title: Anthropic's pre-IPO shares fall as U.S. government shuts down its most powerful AI model
items.summary: A jailbreak report prompted Washington to pull Fable 5 and Mythos 5 from all users. Anthropic complied but pushed back hard, saying the finding sets a standard that would halt the entire AI industry.

items.title: Bitcoin steadies above $63,000 as its worst week in months got a late macro rescue
items.summary: A tiny Strategy sale raised a bigger question about Saylor’s never-sell stance, while easing Iran fears, and a strong SpaceX debut helped risk assets recover.

items.title: Anthropic suspends access to Fable 5, Mythos 5, citing US directive
items.summary: Anthropic has abruptly disabled its flagship AI models after a US government directive citing national security concerns.

items.title: Bitcoin’s ‘calm top’ challenges most market bottom estimates: Research
items.summary: New data from Galaxy Research suggests that Bitcoin's floor price may not drop as low as previous bear markets, but the bottom-finding process is still playing out.

items.title: Trump-linked stablecoin used for bonus payouts at White House UFC contest
items.summary: UFC Freedom 250 paid fighter bonuses in USD1, the stablecoin issued by the Trump-linked crypto venture World Liberty Financial, at a contest held at the White House.

items.title: Ark Invest bought more than $500 million worth of SpaceX shares on IPO day
items.summary: The purchases were likely funded by selling other positions, data shows. ARK is also one of the loudest bitcoin bulls, with a million-dollar target for 2030.

items.title: Live markets:  Bitcoin not fully out of danger as Trump warns of further Iran strikes
items.summary: A ceasefire in April collapsed, and U.S. strikes broke a second truce on June 9 with bitcoin giving back the entire move both times.

items.title: XRP climbs 4% above $1.18 as traders test next resistance zone
items.summary: XRP extended its rebound from recent lows on the strongest buying activity in weeks, with institutional flows and ETF demand supporting a push toward the $1.20 level.

items.title: Bitcoin shoots higher on Iran peace deal, with Strait of Hormuz set to open
items.summary: The price of crude oil is tumbling, and U.S. stock futures are moving higher.

items.title: Bitcoin nears $66K as Trump says US has peace deal with Iran
items.summary: US President Donald Trump says the US and Iran have a deal for a “toll-free opening of the Strait of Hormuz,” sending Bitcoin to a two-week high.

items.title: CFTC sues New Mexico over prediction market jurisdiction
items.summary: New Mexico is the eighth state sued by the CFTC over prediction markets, as Gary Gensler doubted the regulators' claim of authority over sports event contracts.

items.title: Aztec Connect’s abandoned smart contract exploited for $2.1M
items.summary: The Aztec Connect platform was deprecated in March 2023, but the immutable smart contract still held over $2 million in crypto assets.

items.title: Bitcoin mining difficulty drops 10% in 11th largest downward adjustment
items.summary: Bitcoin mining difficulty has undergone its second-largest downward difficulty adjustment this year, following February’s 11% shift.

items.title: Bitcoin could crash to $48,000, if this historical pattern is triggered
items.summary: A pattern stretching back to bitcoin's earliest days has held through every market cycle. It has yet to be tested in the current one.
